programme.title: The Little Murders of Agatha Christie
programme.desc: In an exclusive all-girls' boarding school, teachers are being murdered in unimaginable ways. (S2 E04)

programme.title: Rocamadour (Sn 4 Ep 2)
programme.desc: Part of a gorgeous collection of mysteries, each one set in a different, picturesque region of France. A town in southwestern France that markets itself as a place for miracles gets a reckoning. French with English subtitles.

programme.title: Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: A homesteading family in 1867 Wyoming faces a crisis when the husband is killed and the wife must decide whether to remain or take her son and daughter back East.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Bandit Queen: Once a feared gunfighter and sheriff, the legendary Bat Masterson is now working as a newspaperman. He heads west again to uncover the real story of Pearl Hart, the first woman to rob a stagecoach in the Old West. Masterson tracks down Pearl's partner-in-crime, Joe Boot, who shares every daring and surprising detail from his wild days with the notorious “Bandit Queen.” In a time when outlaws and gunslingers captured the fascination of the American public, Pearl Hart was living proof that in the Wild West a woman could be just as infamous as a man.

programme.title: Far Haven
programme.desc: In 1887, Hunter Braddock moves back to Far Haven, Arizona to start over with his two young children, but when his father-in-law is brutally attacked he must take on the corrupt forces strangling the town in order to protect what he loves most.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Cast Iron Skillets, Baskets, Axes: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Madison, Wisconsin, Jill makes sparks fly with Alisa Toninato, making cast iron skillets in the shape of the 50 states. In Ashley Falls, Massachusetts, JoAnn Catsos is one of only two people in the country to earn a degree in basket making. Joann shows Jill her octofoil basket, a pattern she invented. Finally, in Fairview, Tennessee, Jill meets Anthony Martin, who uses pre-Revolutionary War tools and techniques from the 1600s to craft one of man's oldest tools.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Colorado: It's only fitting that Taylor Hicks should travel to Colorado. After all, the largest flat-top mountain is in Grand Mesa. Okay…you're thinking. Well, “mesa” means table in Spanish, and what do we do at the table? Eat! Singer and entertainer Taylor Hicks tastes his way across the Centennial State on a serious quest to discover the state's most emblematic foods. Things heat up in southeastern Colorado, as he roasts Pueblo green chilies then turn cool and sweet when he picks Rocky Ford cantaloupes. In Denver, he scientifically proves just how much sugar is in Olathe sweet corn. And in the heart of the Rockies, Taylor tries his hand at herding world-renowned Colorado lamb, and samples the state's famous Rocky Mountain oysters. It's an overflowing plateful of Colorado cuisine with the stories and legends behind the state's tastiest foods.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Keep Them Doggies Rollin': The cowboys make a second attempt at rounding up their neighbor's unruly herd, and this time they come out on top as they finally manage to get the cattle penned up. Booger overcomes a number of obstacles in order to pull off an old-fashioned cattle drive right through the center of town. With a number of townsfolk along for the ride, it's slow going, but if he can impress the mayor, it just might become an annual event. Grandma gives the wives a lesson in cowgirl cooking, as they prepare swamp cabbage for the hungry cowboys on the cattle drive.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Texas Fence-Cutting War: When homesteaders keep cutting down her fences to access grazing land and water, a widowed landowner teams up with famed Texas Ranger Ira Aten to protect her property. Aten hopes his explosive plan of action will force the cutters to compromise.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.desc: Bob and team are building a barn for Farmer Pickles. / Farmer Pickles wants to open a camp site on his land.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Bob The Photographer / Mr Bentley's Trains
programme.desc: Bob goes to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs. / Mrs Bentley asks Bob to build a new model railway.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Wendy's Big Night Out / Racing Muck
programme.desc: Bob and Wendy are converting a shop into a restaurant. / Bob is building a new swimming pool for the Mayor.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob wants to impress everybody at the town dance. Molly suggests holding a fashion show.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Spud and the Doves / First Aid Molly
programme.desc: Mr Ellis has doves delivered to use in a magic act. / Bob and the gang are replacing pipes outside town hall.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Mr Bentley - Dogsitter / Travis Gets Lucky
programme.desc: Bob and the gang convert a house into two separate flats. / Farmer Pickles is having problems with mice.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Scoop The Disco Digger / Bob The Farmer
programme.desc: Bob and the gang replace some burst pipes under the main road. / Bob has volunteered to look after the farm.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & her friends decide to put on a talent show, they plan to enter themselves as a band, The Strawberry Jams!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: ARPO
programme.desc: Army commando-robot ARPO has been assigned his toughest mission yet: babysitter!

programme.title: Meekah
programme.desc: Meekah and her best friend Blippi have exciting and educational adventures together.

programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids.

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Come sing along with baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill in Little Angel!

programme.title: Little Angel

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Come sing along with baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill in Little Angel!

programme.title: Morphle Classics
programme.desc: No matter what the town needs, Mila and her magical pet, Morphle will work together to save the day.

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Green Ninja
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd - but realize they have to work together in their attempt to rescue Lloyd from the snakes inside the unstable Fire Temple that is built on a volcano.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is a big dog and he's the leader of an after school club, called the Squirrels. The squirrels have to solve the mystery of the missing red ruby and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is a big dog and he's the leader of an after school club, called the Squirrels. The Squirrels miniaturize themselves and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee

programme.desc: Duggee is a big dog and he's the leader of an after school club, called the Squirrels. Duggee hosts a Buddy Bonanza and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Malicious Mayhem

programme.title: A Basket of Blueberries
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying! Unaware that Strawberry has promised Blueberry she'll take care of Huck at the ball, and feeling sorry for their friend, Lemon and Raspberry independently decide to dress up like Blueberry and fill in for her—neither knowing that the other is also doing so!

programme.title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. “I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!” says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed. To mark the occasion, and to honor all that Berrykin Bloom has done for Berry Bitty City, she decrees that they will have a Berrykin Bloom day, and there will be a ceremony in his honor. Berrykin Bloom is very humble about the whole thing, but the girls wish there was something special they could do to help honor him on his big day.

programme.title: Food that make you Pucker

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Om Nom goes on a series of picnics with his friends, and each picnic is special. Before unpacking the food, Handsome needs to preen, and Scientist Nom needs some impressive gadgets for a comfortable stay. Baby Angry brings something more capacious than a picnic basket, and Starra brings a smile to Om Nom's bouquet. And Nibble Nom saves Om Nom and Om Nelle from the last piece of the cake! / Om Nom understands that organizing a party is no small feat. To simplify things, he creates a well-prepared checklist of tasks he needs to accomplish. First on the list is setting the party mood - check! Next, he sends out invitations - check! And let's not forget the scrumptious carrot cake - check! However, Om Nom faces an unexpected obstacle when it comes to choosing the perfect music. Luckily, his loyal friends and neighbours step in to help. Finally, the moment arrives to rejoice and have an amazing time. Hooray, it's party time and everyone gathers to celebrate! / Om Nom gets frustrated waiting in line, so he tries to find ways to make things faster. But his shortcuts lead to unexpected problems. He ends up looking like a watermelon, trying to reach a yummy jar of jam, and even finds himself behind the cashier's counter. Luckily, a helpful friend always comes to his rescue. And just when you think the fun is over, Om Nom leads everyone to even more excitement!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: What a busy day for Om Nom! His peaceful refreshing swim was interrupted by his friend's plans. Photographing Baby Angry turned out to be a challenge with every shot capturing anything, but her face. / Om Nom has an important job to do he needs to deliver parcels to all his friends in the neighbourhood. Wow, it's trickier than he thought! But the real fun is seeing what's inside each package! Hmm, some boxes are very small... do you believe they house super big things inside? Yes, they do! And hey, did that box just move? Yes! There's a package that escapes, initiating a thrilling pursuit. Want to know what's inside it? Let's find out together in this fun story! / Om Nom takes little Nibble Nom to school and is amazed when Nibble Nom crafts fantastic clay creations! Feeling adventurous, he sneaks in, trying his hand as a student. But oh no! Clay is super challenging for Om Nom. And his attempts lead to giggly mess-ups. But as classes roll on, Om Nom gathers clever tricks. So when pals are in a pinch, Om Nom's there, brilliantly using his new skills to the rescue. And as the day ends, a cheeky secret about Om Nom awaits discovery. Want to know what happened? Watch this funny episode!

programme.title: Jeff Big Daddy Wayne
programme.desc: Comedian Jeff Wayne was dubbed “Big Daddy” by Billy Crystal and Robin Williams on an HBO Comic Relief show. The moniker has stuck to a guy who's been part of the stand-up comedy scene for a long time. He's toured all over the world, several times in Europe. The Norwegian Newspaper “Sondags B.A.”, described him as having “amazing audience communication, and ferociously funny!”

programme.title: Dave Burleigh
programme.desc: Comedian and Impressionist Dave Burleigh's star is on the rise. His uncanny ability to impersonate just about anyone landed him the starring role as Charlie Sheen in "Not Another Celebrity Movie." Burleigh's multiple characters, voices, and impressions were showcased on Season 7 of America's Got Talent, where he became a fast favorite of both judges and fans alike. Judge Howard Stern said, "You have an excellent command of the stage." Fellow comedian and judge Howie Mandel added, "Your impressions were spot on." Burleigh's laid back and easy going style and persona on stage contrasted with his unique facial and body expressions are guaranteed to leave audiences amazed and impressed. As a two-time finalist in the San Francisco Comedy Competition, Burleigh now shares the first runner-up spot with past participant comedy legends like Robin Williams, Ellen DeGeneres, Marc Maron, Dane Cook and Kevin Pollak. With numerous television, podcast and radio appearances, prestigious publications like Rolling Stone are talking, "Burleigh has the trappings of a soon to be comedy star!" This talented, singer, musician, actor, comedian and host tours the world over 36 weeks a year and headlines all the major casinos in Las Vegas. Make sure to catch Dave's show at a theater or comedy club near you, as he will no doubt, leave you with a lasting impression.

programme.title: Tommy Drake
programme.desc: Tommy's unique mixture of original material delivered in a classic style has given him the opportunity to do more shows and be seen by more people live than just about any other comic on the planet.

programme.title: Adam Cozens
programme.desc: A hilarious performer, Adam has been seen on IFC's “The Birthday Boys,” HBO's “Got No Game,” and TBS's “Lopez Tonight.” His stand up has been featured on Nickelodeon's “NickMom,” Hulu's “West Coast Funnies” “Tell Your Friends: The Concert Film,” “The CoExist Comedy Tour” documentary, “ComedyTime,” as well as heard worldwide on Sirius|XM Radio.

programme.title: Russ Nagel
programme.desc: Russ has become recognized in the entertainment industry for achieving more laughs per minute than any comedian working the circuit today and has also been seen on The Nashville Network, A&E's Comedy on the Road, Showtime's Comedy Club Network, the WB, Spike TV, Comedy Central and the list goes on and on. Being a 26+ year veteran of the comedy stage, Russ keeps the laughs coming fast and furious with an array of topics ranging from family and marriage, to travel and current events, and yes he even throws in some biker stuff too.

programme.title: JJ Barrows
programme.desc: JJ Barrows was raised in South Carolina as the middle child of a preacher's family. Having always felt a little different, JJ uses humor to navigate through the realities of life.

programme.title: Bob Stromberg
programme.desc: After forty years performing a blend of stand-up, story, and shtick, Bob Stromberg brings his style to the trials of aging.

programme.title: Marc Yaffee
programme.desc: Adopted at birth and confused ever since, Marc takes his audiences on a comedy joyride as he explores his multi-ethnic roots and the culture clashes that fill his world. Marc's smart but relatable comedy demonstrates a universal appeal that has landed him appearances on PBS, Comics Unleashed, The Latino Laugh Festival and the Showtime special, Goin' Native. Funny not filthy, Marc serves audiences his original comedy recipe, specially prepared for non- stop laughs. Tasty topics, spicy premises and savory punchlines, are all dished out with a dash of sarcasm and a grain of salt. A regular in Las Vegas, Marc has performed six times overseas for Armed Forces Entertainment and he's a past winner of Ventura Comedy Festival's Funniest Person Contest.

programme.title: BT
programme.sub-title: My Life As I Know It Now
programme.desc: With an act that crosses all boundaries, B.T. will surely have you rolling with laughter. His physical performance style and charm landed him two performances on NBC's Friday Night Videos and a performance at the prestigious HBO U.S. Comedy Arts Festival. B.T. has also appeared on BET's Comic View, MTV's The Jenny McCarthy Show, and FOX's The Keenan Ivory Wayans Show.

programme.title: Bryan Callen Man Class
programme.desc: Bryan Callen gives his unique take on how to be a real man in modern society.

programme.title: Tom Papa Freaked Out
programme.desc: A frequent guest of late night talk shows, Tom Papa showcases his uniquely optimistic humor in his first EPIX comedy special.

programme.title: Tom Papa: Human Mule
programme.desc: Veteran comedian, Tom Papa, returns in Human Mule with a refreshingly positive take on fighting for survival in an increasingly chaotic world.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan Noble Ape
programme.desc: In his 6th special, Jim uses humor to deal with the unthinkable & proves that laughter is the best medicine, or is it?

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Quality Time
programme.desc: Comedian Jim Gaffigan performs live at the State Theatre in Minneapolis, MN.

programme.title: Break Up Nightmare
programme.desc: Kate welcomes brother-in-law David back, grateful for his help. But as his behavior crosses boundaries, she discovers his hidden agenda to take over the family

programme.title: Geo-Disaster
programme.desc: A family in Los Angeles finds themselves separated during a convergence of history's greatest disasters: a super volcano, a mega earthquake and a massive twister. While the world endures this near apocalyptic event, our heroes must persevere on their own skills and wit to reunite and survive.

programme.title: Asteroid Vs Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the world?s greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: Atlantic Rim
programme.desc: When giant monsters crawl out of the Atlantic Ocean and attack the Eastern Seaboard, the U.S. government is forced to trust A.I. robots to defend the country.

programme.title: 2012 Ice Age
programme.desc: When a volcanic eruption in Iceland sends a glacier hurtling toward North America, a family struggles to escape the onslaught of the coming ice age.

programme.title: The Pumpkin Karver
programme.desc: After mistaking him for a masked killer, Jonathan fatally stabs his sister's boyfriend. A year later, the siblings find themselves fighting against a familiar masked murderer.

programme.title: Dead Awake
programme.desc: Drawing on the well-documented and infamous affliction known as sleep paralysis, "Dead Awake" is a terrifying new addition to the horror canon. With Lori Petty and Jesse Bradford.

programme.title: Half Light
programme.desc: Real terror and the supernatural conspire to haunt grieving novelist Rachel Carlson (Demi Moore, "G.I. Jane") when she moves to a remote Scottish village after the death of her son.

programme.title: Ted Bundy
programme.desc: This shocking docu-drama explores the life of Ted Bundy, the infamous and charismatic serial killer who murdered at least 19 women in the 1970s.

programme.title: Metro
programme.desc: Moscow's underground train system sees terror after a collapsed tunnel causes massive flooding. Subtitled.

programme.title: Checkmate
programme.desc: Six people come together during an elaborate bank heist during which any move can alter the outcome. Is it coincidence, or are they merely pawns in a much bigger game?

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: Le serment de Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria Brooks, une obstétricienne réputée, est harcelée par une mystérieuse personne qui semble être liée à l'un de ses anciens patients.

programme.title: L'amour en miniature
programme.desc: Lorsque le père d'Olivia, modéliste, s'apprête à prendre sa retraite, elle pense qu'elle est la personne toute désignée pour le remplacer.

programme.title: Un coeur à louer
programme.desc: Poppy est une spécialiste du marketing qui fait semblant d'être fiancée avec le nouveau client séduisant de son patron.

programme.title: Ce qu'Alice ne vous dit pas
programme.desc: Un veuf reçoit l'aide bien nécessaire d'Alice, une jolie, mais mystérieuse, nouvelle voisine.

programme.title: Bodega De Edgar
programme.desc: The courageous story of Edgar Torres immigrating to the US illegally with his father in the 80's, becoming a wine expert and starting a winery in Paso Robles, CA to give his children a better future. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Osama & Ayman
programme.desc: Osama and Ayman Abdeldayem skate through the streets of our nation's capital, while navigating growing Islamophobia with style and humor. Directed by Ben Mullinkosson, Sam Price-Waldman, and Chris Cresci.

programme.title: Elder
programme.desc: A Mormon missionary finds his world turned upside down when he falls in love with a handsome, Italian Communist. With original 8mm film Tom Clark recounts a love story on the coast of Italy. Directed by Genéa Gaudet.

programme.title: Wonder Mark
programme.desc: Los Angeles icon Mark Mahoney is the tattoo artist for Tupac, David Beckham, Lana Del Rey and Johnny Depp. In a surreal man-versus-myth-style documentary, Mahoney inks French troubadour Johnny Hallyday while he talks about his personal hopes and fears. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: Cherry Pop: The Story Of The World's Fanciest Cat
programme.desc: Cherry Pop was no ordinary cat. Beloved by her wealthy socialite owners, she lived life in the lap of luxury. This delightful story will tickle your funny bone and touch your heart. Directed by Kareem Tabsch.

programme.title: Strike
programme.desc: Bill Fong is passionate about bowling. One seeming ordinary night all may change for this underdog as Fong begins to get strike after strike, nearing the ever elusive 'perfect series.' Directed by Joey Daoud.

programme.title: The Fate Of The Wild
programme.desc: On the vast, desolate rangeland of Nevada, herds of wild horses still run free. When the Bureau of Land Management determines the herds have grown too large, it sends a helicopter to buzz overhead and corral the animals into pens to be either sold or slaughtered. For years, activist and artist Laura Leigh has been photographing and documenting the abuses these wild horses have suffered. The Fate of the Wild shows that the fate of these majestic, untamed symbols of the American West is intertwined with our own. Directed by Andrew Michael Ellis.

programme.title: The Rocket On The Roof
programme.desc: Curiosity gets the best of a man trying to solve the mystery of a rocket curiously perched on a nearby roof. Directed by Ryan Maxey and Josh Polon.

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In the southern state of Oaxaca where, in the indigenous communities around the town of Juchitán, the world is not divided simply into males and females. The local Zapotec people have made room for a third category, which they call “muxes” - men who consider themselves women and live in a socially sanctioned limbo between the two genders. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: We Are Oscar Mike
programme.desc: Through his non-profit foundation, Oscar Mike, Noah helps rehabilitate other veterans through the adaptive sports that saved his own life. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Kid Yamaka
programme.desc: This deeply human story explores boxer Zachary "Kid Yamaka” Wohlman's difficult past, his training under world-class coach Freddie Roach, and his path to personal redemption through boxing, Judaism, and sobriety. With Zachary's 2021 passing, this film serves as a moving tribute to his hustle, heart and soul and to all those who struggle with addiction. Directed by Matt Ogens.

programme.title: Slomo
programme.desc: Depressed and frustrated with his life, Dr. John Kitchin abandons his career as a neurologist and moves to Pacific Beach. There, he undergoes a radical transformation into SLOMO, trading his lab coat for a pair of rollerblades and his IRA for a taste of divinity. Directed by Joshua Izenberg.

programme.title: Mister Sunshine
programme.desc: Meet the millionaire who became a shoeshine man peddling goodwill and cheer throughout Auckland. Larry Woods provides brilliant thoughts on how to live a happy life. Directed by Eldon Booth.

programme.title: Five Stone Of Lead
programme.desc: On the west coast of Ireland kids don't dream about winning the world cup, they dream about being championship jockeys. This is the story of a 12 year old jockey, Dylan, who is tiny even for a jockey. Directed by Jonny Madderson and Jono Stevens.

programme.title: The Blessings Of Aging
programme.desc: The sweet and sassy residents of a retirement community explain the many upsides of getting older. Directed by Jenny Schweitzer Bell.

programme.title: Dolphin Lover
programme.desc: Dolphin Lover is a critically acclaimed, award winning short documentary on the incredible true story of Malcolm Brenner and his summer long love affair with Dolly the dolphin. Directed by Joey Daoud and Kareem Tabsch.

programme.title: Pickle Man
programme.desc: Facing certain death by ALS, Arthur Cohen decides to leave a legacy of pickles. PickALS, that is. Arthur is brilliant, hilarious and courageous in this intimate portrait of a man facing a brutal disease. Directed by Nastasya Popov.

programme.title: NF Forward: Being Kylie Earl
programme.desc: Kylie suffers from a rare genetic disease called Neurofibromatosis which from birth affected her left eye. She has never been able to see from it, as she got older the plexiform tumors caused her eye to be removed. Against odds Kylie, a bubbly 16yr old is a high performing athlete, a back spotter in the Texas Elite Cheer team. While facing crippling mental blocks and battling low muscle tone because of her condition she preserves in a sport that favors not only physical aesthetics but requires precision, strength and flawless technique.

programme.title: Gotta Groove Records
programme.desc: A short film on the history and resurgence of vinyl records from the perspective of an artist focused pressing plant in Cleveland, Ohio. A hero story about grit, manufacturing and warm tones. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: A View From The Window
programme.desc: An immersive glimpse of a school day through the eyes of deaf children. Follow a third grade class at the California School for the Deaf in Fremont as they learn about everything from marine life to police harassment. Directed by Christian Filippone and Azar Kafaei.

programme.title: Hotel 22
programme.desc: Each night in Silicon Valley, a public bus transforms into an unofficial shelter for the homeless. Hotel 22 captures a single, dramatic night on the Line 22 route. Directed by Elizabeth Lo.

programme.title: Lazarus
programme.desc: Lazarus is a short documentary following Lazarus Chigwandali, a street musician with Albinism from Malawi as he teams up with a London-based music producer to record his debut album. Directed by David Darg.

programme.title: Five Star
programme.desc: With 41 full-ride Division 1 scholarship offers, Brandon Jones is one of the most heavily recruited high school football players in the country. Directed by Ryan Booth.

programme.title: How To Make A Rainbow
programme.desc: The story of a young girl and her mother, observed over the course of two years, as they move together through transitions of home, identity and name. Directed by Ryan Maxey.

programme.title: Deprogrammed
programme.desc: DEPROGRAMMED chronicles Ted 'Black Lightning' Patrick's anti-cult crusade. His practice of deprogramming, also known as “reverse brainwashing,” quickly snowballed into a vast underground movement composed of concerned parents, ex-cultists, and sympathetic law-enforcers whose mission was to physically and mentally remove individuals from cults. Some of the people he's saved, however, wonder if his services cause more harm than good. Directed by Mia Donovan.

programme.title: Christmas In New York
programme.desc: In the vein of Love Actually, the story follows six different couples in a posh Manhattan hotel over the course of one night just before Christmas.

programme.title: Holiday Baggage
programme.desc: Respectively a pediatrician and soon to be retired commercial pilot, Sarah and Pete Murphy, who have two grown daughters Lisa and Holly, have been legally separated for ten years. They lead different lives, Pete who lives hard, cavorts around the world and did cheat on Sarah when they were together, while Sarah is more focused on family. Since the separation which the girls mistakenly believe is a full divorce, Pete has been out of his family's life, he who has made little effort to keep in touch, while Lisa in particular has purposefully excluded her father from her life, including not inviting him to her wedding to longtime fiancé and family friend/neighbor Andrew Priester, and not having told him that they are having a baby. Sarah has not condoned Lisa's attitude, but also has done nothing to try and change it. Just prior to Thanksgiving, Pete is forced to return to Chicago to meet with Sarah when he makes the decision to remarry, to a woman named Kelly, who is young enough to be his daughter and with who he is moving permanently to the Bahamas, and thus requires Sarah to sign the final divorce papers. He expects solely to be in Chicago long enough to see Sarah and the girls to tell them the news and to invite them to the wedding. Out of circumstance, Pete is forced to stay in Chicago longer than he anticipated. In finding out about all that has and is going on in Sarah and the girls' lives, Pete may take stock of his relationships with them and if time will have healed all wounds in their family.

programme.title: Christmas in the City
programme.desc: With the threat of having to close her father's candy store, Wendy and her six-year-old daughter Grace travel to the big city in hopes of making extra holiday cash to save the store.

programme.title: Christmas in The Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: Convicted
programme.desc: Convicted stars Glenn Ford as a hotheaded young man convicted of manslaughter.

programme.title: Three On A Couch
programme.desc: To convince his fiance to marry him, a man must don various disguises to help cure three of her patients.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. Williams
programme.desc: A crafty detective courts trouble as he sets out to clear the name of a suspected murderer.

programme.title: Miss Sadie Thompson
programme.desc: A former prostitute inflames the passions of the Marines and a missionary at a remote outpost.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job, and takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.sub-title: Short Rope for a Tall Man
programme.desc: Lucas is threatened with hanging by a lynch party when some horses he has purchased in a neighboring town turn out to be stolen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: George Shearing & Neil Swanson
programme.sub-title: George Shearing Duo feat. Neil Swainson
programme.desc: British pianist George Shearing enjoyed an international reputation as an instrumentalist, arranger, and composer. Equally at home on the classical concert stage as in jazz clubs, he was recognized for his inventive, orchestrated jazz. In this live recording from the Munich Philharmonie, Shearing played in a duo format with Canadian double bassist Neil Swainson. The repertoire consisted of a selection of compositions by Shearing himself, among them ‘Lullaby Of Birdland', which is a standard in jazz repertoire.

programme.title: Gil Evans & Ornette Coleman
programme.sub-title: Gil Evans, Ornette Coleman - Schloss Ansbach
programme.desc: This program presents two concerts from Schloss Ansbach in 1978. The first concert features Gil Evans and his orchestra, consisting of Gil Evans on piano, Steve Lacy on soprano saxophone, Arthur Blythe on alto saxophone, Pit Levin on synthesizers, Earl McIntyre on trombone, Lewis Soloff on trumpet, Geoffrey Berlin on bass and Sue Evans on percussion instruments. The second concert features saxophonist Ornette Coleman at the peak of his musically expressive powers. Coleman is joined by Bern Nix on guitar, Charles Ellerbee on guitar, Albert Arnold on bass, and Shannon Jackson on drums and percussion.

programme.title: John Patitucci, Marco Pignataro, Joe Lovano & Terri Lyne Carrington
programme.sub-title: The Tällberg Foundation: "Jazz for the Planet
programme.desc: On October 19, 2021, John Patitucci (bass), Marco Pignataro (sax and musical director), and Joe Lovano (sax) showcased inspirational new originals at GBH's Fraser Performance Studio in Boston, MA, accompanied by Terri Lyne Carrington (drums), Nadia Washington (vocals), Chico Pinheiro (guitar), and Anastassiya Petrova (piano). This recording, titled 'Tällberg's Jazz for the Planet', was made in support of the Tällberg Foundation's message and aims to inspire positive climate action. Since 1981, the Tällberg Foundation has been trying to nurture new thinking, in part by looking at societal challenges through the lenses of artists.

programme.title: Kenny G
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1987, smooth jazz saxophonist and crowd-favorite Kenny G serenaded those attending the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. After beginning his career in the Love Unlimited Orchestra, he now brings his own band for this hypnotic performance.

programme.title: Duke Ellington
programme.desc: The Royal Concertgebouw in Amsterdam is a world-renowned concert hall, known for its first-rate acoustics. It has attracted many famous performers over the years and is one of the Netherlands' most treasured musical institutions. On November 2, 1958, American jazz titan Duke Ellington and his Orchestra performed two concerts at the Concertgebouw in Amsterdam. Among the many talents in the Orchestra were trumpeter Clark Terry, trombonist Quentin Jackson, saxophonist Johnny Hodges and violinist Ray Nance.

programme.title: Chet Baker
programme.desc: American trumpet player and occasional singer Chet Baker (1929-1988) was one of the most popular exponents of bebop and cool jazz. At the age of 10, Baker was introduced to music in a school orchestra, after which he discovered bebop in the army in 1946. After serving six months in prison in 1953 for drug possession, Baker formed his own quartet with West Coast jazz great, pianist Russ Freeman. His lifelong drug addiction forced him to concertize and record incessantly. Always popular in Europe, Chet Baker (trumpet, vocals) joined Jacques Pelzer (alto saxophone, flute), Luigi Trussardi (bass), Franco Manzecchi (drums), and René Urtreger (piano) for a set in Brussels, Belgium, on May 2, 1964. They performed Bye Bye Blackbird, Isn't It Romantic, Airegin, Time After Time and So What. On September 3, 1979, Baker appeared at the Kongsberg Jazz Festival in Norway. He was joined by Wolfgang Lackerschmid (vibraphone), Michel Graillier (piano), and Jean Louis Rassenfosse (bass) for performances of Blue Train, Softly, As In A Morning Sunrise, Five Years Ago, and Love For Sale.

programme.title: Adele
programme.desc: Fans at the iTunes Festival: London 2011 were blown away with the performance of English singer-songwriter Adele. This concert was recorded live on stage at The Roundhouse in London, United Kingdom, where Adele gave one of the best shows of her career with her unique voice.

programme.desc: Unplugged - Summer Solstice is the fourth live album, and the first in acoustic format, from the Norwegian band A-ha.

programme.title: Marvin Gaye
programme.desc: Marvin Gaye- Born in 1939, in Washington, D.C., Marvin Gaye sang in his father's church and in the Moonglows before signing with Motown. He recorded songs by Smokey Robinson before becoming his own producer on the protest album What's Going On (1971). Gaye was killed in 1984 during a domestic dispute with his father.

programme.title: Al Green
programme.desc: Al Green is known for the hit song "Let's Stay Together," and for leaving his musical career at its height in the 1970s to become a reverend at his own church.

programme.title: Ziggy Marley
programme.desc: The Fillmore Auditorium is a historic concert hall in San Francisco, California. Founded by Bill Graham, it was named after being located originally on the corners of Fillmore Street and Geary Boulevard.

programme.desc: Explore the hottest contemporary jazz artists in a smooth-flowing soundscape, featuring melodic and stylish guitars, saxophones, pianos, trumpets.

programme.title: Evgeny Kissin, Nikolai Demidenko, Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra & Antoni Wit
programme.desc: Antoni Wit conducts the Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra in performances of Chopin's Piano Concertos No. 1, Op. 11 and No. 2, Op. 21. Soloists are Nikolai Demidenko and Evgeny Kissin. After performing the first concerto, Demidenko encores with Chopin's Mazurka Op. 17/4. Kissin closes the concert with Chopin's Etude Op. 10/12 and the Waltz in E minor, Op. post. This concert was part of the celebration of Chopin's 200th anniversary in 2010. Chopin composed the second concerto one year before the Concerto No. 1 and completed both works at the age of 20, before leaving his home country Poland and moving to Paris.

programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.sub-title: Symphonies in D by Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Conductor Herbert Blomstedt and the Gewandhausorchester take us on a musical journey to the Czech Republic in this 2020 concert from Leipzig's Gewandhaus. The program opens with Bohemian composer Jan Václav Hugo Voríšek's Symphony in D major, Op. 23 (1821). Although the composition – Voríšek's only symphony – was never performed during the composer's lifetime, it has become one of his most-performed works today. Also on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Symphony No. 38 in D major, K. 504. This work, which premiered while Mozart was visiting Prague in 1787, is often referred to as the ‘Prague Symphony'.

programme.title: Seong-Jin Cho
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 1 in F major, Op. 18, No. 1 String Quartet No. 10 in E-flat major, Op. 74, "Harp" and String Quartet No. 9 in C major, Op. 59, No. 3, "Razumovsky". This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 13, 2020.

programme.title: The Big Letdown
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: Disaster at the Derby
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car, Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when they're forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle.

programme.title: Look What You Did!
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors who are understandably upset that their late model Tahoe has found its way to the bottom of a lake. Is it Froy's fault, as they claim, or are there other forces at work here? Then, Lou and Matt get down and dirty with a taser-packing P.I. who isn't ready to say goodbye to his ride. Finally, when Frankie puts the go-jacks on the wrong car, it plucks Matt's last nerve and places him at risk for the beat-down of the century.

programme.title: Interview with the Repo Man
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist. Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Phi Alpha Fail
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in and fight the drunken mob. And when Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations, they become the RO's ticket to fame in a violent potato launcher attack bound to go viral.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Monster of a Problem
programme.desc: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife. Then, Lou and Lyndah interrupt a seaside party to repo a motorboat away from a gaggle of misguided youths. And, Lou, Froy, and Sonia head to the dirt track to repossess a car from an event promoter. They seem to be able to reason with him, but his monster truck-driving brother with no respect for human life may prove to be a problem.

programme.title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform to Platform Jump, Barber Shop, Container Launch
programme.desc: This episode features four co-ed pairs competing as teams. In the first stunt, both team members leap back and forth between two platforms hanging from helicopters with each person transferring up to 10 flags from one platform to the other and then jumping in the water. The three teams to get highest flag total will advance to the next round. In the second stunt one team member is seated in a barber chair and their partner spins them. When the chair stops, they have to get whichever haircut their head was pointing to. There are six haircuts they can get. Teams would advance to the finals if both members got their designated haircuts. In the finale a crane lifts a large container to 200 feet in the air, both team members have to climb rope ladders hanging from the container. Once they reach the container, they both have to scale a narrow ledge on the side, collect two Allen wrenches, and climb another ladder to the top. Once on top, they have to use the wrenches to unscrew hatches and climb down into the container. When they were both inside, they have to touch two pieces of a live wire together in order to blow themselves out of the container and into the water below. The team to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champions at winning $50,000. This week competing in the Home Invasion is the Frederickson family of Hagerstown, Maryland.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Eye of the Storm
